channel.title: CF7 inputs not working
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
Hi community! I have a problem with Contact Form 7 integration. I've to add an acceptance field, but when i submit the form, it seems that the value is not send to server and the response is always "You must accept ....". Any idea? I'm using this package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7 , because the package https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-contact-form-7 doesn't work on my project.

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: alexis.doroszkiewicz
item.description:
Thank you Kasper

It seems to work even for not requiered checkboxes for me
However it only works for single checkboxes

Multiple checkboxes only sends ‘1’ if any checkbox is checked, without providing values

I can still get my form to send the proper informations by spliting multiple checkboxes into individual ones so this is not a huge concern

But if you somehow have time to release a not beta version of this including multiple checkbox this would be amazing !

Again, thank you so much for your package, it helps a ton

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
@alex.bicego @vanessa.dallapozza @simone.tissi I have released a beta version:

npm

@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7

Contact Form 7 extension for Frontity theme.. Latest version: 0.2.14, last published: 14 days ago. Start using @aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7 in your project by running `npm i @aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7`. There are no other projects...

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: vanessa.dallapozza
item.description:
Hi Kasper!
I’m having the same issue. Can you show us how you did it, please?
That would be great!

Thanks,

  • Vanessa

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: alex.bicego
item.description:
Hi @kasper where could I find the fix that you made?

Thank You!

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: simone.tissi
item.description:
Hi @kasper ,
Thank you! I had already solved it by putting a custom control outside cf7, recovering the button and disabling it when the checkbox I entered is not selected. But I’ll try your solution!

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: alex.bicego
item.description:
Hi @kasper,
First of all, thank you! For now, a required checkbox is more than enough, I’ve planned to make the field not optional either way. Maybe In the future, I’ll need the optional one but not right now.

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi @alex.bicego @simone.tissi,

I have made a fix, but for now, it only supports an accept button that has to be checked, it can not be optional. Would that be okay? Or does it need to support optional as well?

-Kasper

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: alex.bicego
item.description:
Hi!
I’m having the same problem with the acceptance fields with the same package.

I’ve already added the code in the frontity-settings.js and the form is working as intended but for those fields.
I’ve tried the form without the acceptance fields and the email was sent succesfully.

You can check the form on this page Scrivici - Goldnet

Thank you!

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: saurabhjaydhar
item.description:
In this scenario, if you have not added the package name in frontity-settings.js then you have to add this package.

"packages": [
  "@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7"
  // other packages ...
]

And if you already added the following things like that and yet not working. then you can give access to me your project. I will try to help you. I have solved this kind of issue before. Feel free to reply to me here.

Read full topic

item.title: CF7 inputs not working
item.dc:creator: simone.tissi
item.description:
Hi community!
I have a problem with Contact Form 7 integration.
I’ve to add an acceptance field, but when i submit the form, it seems that the value is not send to server and the response is always “You must accept …”.
Any idea? I’m using this package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7 , because the package frontity-contact-form-7 - npm doesn’t work on my project.

Read full topic
